articles.title: Extreme heat forces Tiffany Trump to cut Jaisalmer trip short - The Times of India
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Rajasthan
articles.full_text:
Jaisalmer: Amid intense summer heat in Jaisalmer,
Tiffany Trump, the younger daughter of US President Donald Trump, cut short her scheduled engagements in the city and departed for
Jamnagar, Gujarat, Monday morning. She was accompanied by her husband, Michael Boulos, and US Ambassador to India, Sergio Gor.
Her departure was originally scheduled for 4 pm, but the itinerary was revised due to extreme weather conditions. Tiffany was scheduled to visit two of Jaisalmer’s prominent tourist attractions, Gadisar Lake and the historic Patwon Ki Haveli, but left for Jamnagar without visiting them.
Officials from the Jaisalmer district administration and other authorities bid her farewell at Jaisalmer Civil Airport at around 9 am. According to available information, Tiffany Trump, Michael Boulos and Ambassador Sergio Gor departed from Jaisalmer at approximately 9:15 am aboard a special chartered aircraft bound for Jamnagar.
During her departure, Tiffany described her stay in Jaisalmer as “memorable”.
Stringent security arrangements were in place at Jaisalmer airport as Tiffany and her entourage arrived for departure, with security agencies remaining on high alert throughout the visit. The Jaisalmer police and district administration maintained extensive security arrangements from the airport to the tourist attractions and the hotel premises.
During her stay in Jaisalmer, Tiffany explored the historic Jaisalmer Fort and other heritage sites, experienced Rajasthan’s folk culture, and shared photographs and videos from the trip on social media.
